title: kineo #2795
definition:
1) to cause to go, i.e. to move, set in motion
    1a) to be moved, move: of that motion which is evident in life
    1b) to move from a place, to remove
 2) metaph.
    2a) to move excite
    2b) a riot, disturbance
    2c) to throw into commotion
